missing_at_or_below_zero.label: Clinical documentation is missing
missing_at_or_below_zero.message: This rule fires when the packet does not support clinical documentation.

missing_below_one.label: Clinical documentation is missing
missing_below_one.message: This rule fires when the packet does not support clinical documentation.

incomplete_at_or_below_half.label: Clinical documentation support is incomplete
incomplete_at_or_below_half.message: This rule fires when the packet only partially supports clinical documentation.
incomplete_at_or_below_half.counterfactual_hint: Add complete evidence showing clinical documentation.

missing_equals_zero.label: Clinical documentation is missing
missing_equals_zero.message: This rule fires when the packet does not support clinical documentation.

rules.label: Clinical documentation support is incomplete
rules.message: This rule fires when the packet only partially supports clinical documentation.
rules.counterfactual_hint: Add complete evidence showing clinical documentation.
